_comment: Template for flashback timeline puzzles. Use this format when generating new puzzles.
_llm_prompt: Generate a timeline puzzle with exactly 9 historical events about [THEME]. For each event provide: id (unique identifier like e1, e2, etc.), description (what happened in past tense, no year mentioned), year (the year it occurred, negative for BCE). Events should span a range of years to make ordering challenging. Output as JSON.

events.description: Construction of the Great Pyramid begins
The first Olympic Games are held
The fall of the Western Roman Empire
The Library of Alexandria is destroyed

schema.events[].description: string (required, past tense, no year mentioned)
